tool_calls:
total=0
if [ -d /src ]; then
  while IFS= read -r -d '' file; do
    count=$(grep -oF 'console.log' "$file" | wc -l)
    count=${count//[[:space:]]/}
    if [ "$count" -gt 0 ]; then
      sed -i 's/console\.log/logger.info/g' "$file"
      printf '%s: %s replacements\n' "$file" "$count"
      total=$((total + 1))
    fi
  done < <(find /src -type f -name '*.js' -print0)
fi
printf 'Files modified: %d\n' "$total"

tmp=$(mktemp)
: > "$tmp"
if [ -d /src ]; then
  find /src -type f -name '*.js' -exec bash -c '
    for file do
      count=$(grep -oF "console.log" "$file" | wc -l)
      count=${count//[[:space:]]/}
      if (( count > 0 )); then
        sed -i "s/console\.log/logger.info/g" "$file"
        printf "%s: %d replacements\n" "$file" "$count"
      fi
    done
  ' _ {} + | tee "$tmp"
fi
n=$(wc -l < "$tmp")
n=${n//[[:space:]]/}
rm -f "$tmp"
printf 'Files modified: %d\n' "$n"
